name: Emerge Gaming Limited
summary: Emerge Gaming Limited develops and markets an online eSport and gaming tournament platform in Eastern Europe and South Africa. It develops Arcade X online gaming platform, which focuses on skill based tournaments and matches, where players compete to enhance their user rankings/status in the virtual gaming world and for digital merchandise to enhance their gaming experience, as well as offers a market place that gives players the opportunity to enter pay-to-play competitions and tournaments. The company is based in Perth, Australia.
